pi_items.source: verifier.py uses task_info.get('metadata', {}).get('pass_threshold', 60) against the calculated score (20 points per fixed bug)

privileged_info_summary: The task creates synthetic, buggy Python source files using setup_task.sh. The verifier assigns 20 points per fixed bug, and a pass_threshold of 60 points is explicitly enforced in verifier.py.
